nav-back: color: var(--wa-green); display: flex; align-items: center;
nav-avatar: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6EC8B5, #128C7E); flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 13px; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 600;
e2e-banner: align-self: center; background: #FFF5C4; color: #54636D; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px; max-width: 240px; text-align: center; line-height: 1.3; box-shadow: 0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
bubble: max-width: 78%; padding: 6px 10px 18px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.3; color: var(--text); position: relative; word-wrap: break-word; box-shadow: 0 1px 0.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
ticks: display: inline-flex; width: 14px; height: 10px; color: var(--read-blue);
voice-play: width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--wa-green); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
wave: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5px; height: 22px; flex: 1;
input-field: flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 22px; padding: 7px 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 34px;
send-circle: width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--wa-green); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; flex: 1;
